settings.title: Settings
settings.culturalPromptingDescription: Adds an instruction for the model to consider cultural context when generating responses.

compare.title: Compare multilingual LLM responses
compare.description: Evaluate semantic similarity, embedding projections and cultural differences between GPT responses.

embedding.title: Embedding Projection (PCA)
embedding.description: Two-dimensional projection of prompt and response embeddings.

similarity.title: Semantic Similarity
similarity.description: Cosine similarity between embedding vectors. Values closer to 1 indicate greater semantic similarity.

history.title: Experiment History
history.detailsHint: Click a table row to view experiment details.

statistics.title: Statistics
statistics.description: Aggregated results of all conducted experiments.
statistics.judgeComparisonDescription: Average scores for responses generated in Polish and English.
statistics.differenceDescription: Average advantage of responses generated in Polish over responses generated in English.
statistics.similarityDescription: Average, minimum and maximum cosine similarity values.
statistics.bestWorstDescription: Experiments with the highest and lowest similarity values.
statistics.distributionDescription: Distribution of translation directions and cultural prompting.
statistics.heatmapDescription: Comparison of average scores for responses generated in Polish and English.
